title: Triage mTLS handshake and certificate failures
description: Correlate PeerAuthentication mode, DestinationRule TLS mode, and certificate issuance to find the mismatch causing connection resets.
body: Use when meshed calls fail with connection resets or TLS errors after enabling mTLS. Do not disable mTLS to make it work. Actions: check the PeerAuthentication mode on the server side (STRICT vs PERMISSIVE), confirm the client's DestinationRule trafficPolicy.tls mode (ISTIO_MUTUAL vs DISABLE/SIMPLE) is consistent, verify the workload received a certificate from the mesh CA, and look for a plaintext caller hitting a STRICT server. Validation signals include telemetry showing the connection upgrade to mTLS and the handshake succeeding with workload identities. Risk boundary: changing mTLS mode in production is human-gated.
